channel.title: Anto Subash - template
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: ABP no-layer module template
item.description: In this article, you will learn how to create a no-layer module template for abp application.

item.title: Abp CLI Template
item.description: In this post we will see how to create a Cli for your abp application.
